caption: Figure 7.5: Georgina Ballantine holds the British record for a 64-pound rod-caught salmon from River Tay, Scotland in 1922.
Figure 7.5: Georgina Ballantine holds the British record for a 64-pound rod-caught salmon from River Tay, Scotland in 1922.
description: Black and white photograph of Georgina Ballantine standing with a fishing rod next to a large salmon lying on the ground.
